zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Erskine於1405年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，她的父親Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine27歲，母親Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay16歲。她和Walter Stewart Master of Fife至少有2個兒子。她去世於1425年6月2日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年20歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Erskine于1405年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，她的父亲Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine27岁，母亲Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay16岁。她和Walter Stewart Master of Fife至少有2个儿子。她去世于1425年6月2日在苏格兰斯林史爾享年20岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Erskine was born in 1405, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, was 27 and her mother, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, was 16. She had at least 2 sons with Walter Stewart Master of Fife. She died on 2 June 1425, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Erskine est née en 1405, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Walter Stewart Master of Fife. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1425, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 20 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Erskine 1405 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine 27 und ihre Mutter Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay 16. Sie hatte mit Walter Stewart Master of Fife mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 2. Juni 1425 im Alter von 20 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Erskine è nata il nel 1405 nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Walter Stewart Master of Fife. Morì il 2 giugno 1425, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 20 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Erskineが1405年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskineは27歳，母Marjory Elizabeth Lindsayは16歳であった。彼女はWalter Stewart Master of Fifeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1425年6月2日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで20歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Erskine(이)가 1405년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Walter Stewart Master of Fife(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 6월 2일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Erskine nasceu em 1405, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Walter Stewart Master of Fife. Ela faleceu em 2 de junho de 1425, em Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Erskine родилась в 1405 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Walter Stewart Master of Fife. Она умерла 2 июня 1425 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 20 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Erskine nació en 1405, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Erskine 1st Lord Erskine, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marjory Elizabeth Lindsay, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Walter Stewart Master of Fife. Murió el 2 de junio de 1425, en Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 20 años.
